seoTitle: Hughesdale vs Humevale — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Hughesdale and Humevale. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hughesdale and Humevale.
heading: Hughesdale vs Humevale — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hughesdale, Victoria and Humevale, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Humevale has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Hughesdale (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hughesdale or Humevale safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hughesdale has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Humevale scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hughesdale scores 51/100 for bushfire risk. Humevale scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hughesdale or Humevale?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Humevale has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
